Products (NYSE:APD) highlight company's latest technologies metals processing industry Treat Conference Exhibition Detroit, Mich., October 20-22. company share latest developments furnace atmospheres including plasma-activated hardening steels atmospheric-pressure treating trends conference's technical program.
Metals processors invited Products booth speak knowledgeable representative about their particular treating challenges. years treating experience, Products' applications engineers customers learn their specific annealing, brazing, hardening sintering process recommendations improve their overall operation.
Products' industrial gases available variety supply modes match customer's requirements efficiently cost-effectively. company offers handling equipment technology, process audits troubleshooting, metals processors optimize lower operating costs, maximize uptime, increase throughput, improve product quality.
Zbigniew Zurecki, senior research associate Products, share developments atmosphere treatments Directions Opportunities Treating" panel session Wednesday morning, October addition, Products' Liang principal application engineer, present results original research titled "Optimization Protective Atmospheres Annealing Hardening Operations Continuous Furnaces" during Atmosphere Technology Session Wednesday afternoon.
